log_only.capability_boundary: Checks whether the operation event is present in the fixture log. It does not prove policy/evidence linkage, provenance/output closure, or integrity.

policy_only.capability_boundary: Checks only local policy rule fields. It does not prove evidence, provenance, output closure, validation closure, or digest consistency.

schema_only.capability_boundary: Structural JSON Schema validation only; no reference, policy/evidence, provenance/output, validation/provenance, digest, or case-semantic checks.
